action.reasoning: First iteration: establish a baseline and measure iteration time. I will train a ConvNeXt-Tiny model for 2 epochs using standard CrossEntropyLoss. The dataset has 40% noise, but neural networks tend to learn clean patterns early in training, so a short run should yield a reasonable baseline. I will also submit an evaluation to verify the predict.py script and measure the time taken.
